name: Karakter
description: Michelin-listed bold bistro in Kazimierz — a love letter to meat and offal (sweetbreads, tongue, pig's ears, ostrich stomach, horse tartare) with French technique, plus a mussel bar and inventive desserts. Industrial-warm room, strong wine list, lively atmosphere. Seasonal menu — current theme: 'Lato w sercu rzeźnika' ('Summer in the butcher's heart').
price_caveat: Seasonal menu — items rotate. Verify on-site.
